extensionDescription.message: Advanced data extraction ecosystem supporting cross-page capturing, regex parsing, and bidirectional filtering.

headerDesc.message: Support cross-page tracking extraction, say goodbye to repetitive single-page actions.

textModePlaceholder.message: Paste any messy text containing links, emails, phone numbers, or specific data here...

continuousLabel.message: 🔴 Enable Cross-page Memory Pool (Keep data on reload/tab switch)

advancedToggle.message: ⚙️ Data Cleaning & Parsing Engine (Click to Expand)

regexLabel.message: Regular Expression (Use parentheses for capture groups)

filterEmpty.message: No matching data extracted. Please adjust filters.

aboutDesc.message: Designed to provide developers and data analysts with the purest front-end data capture experience.

aboutFeat1.message: Anti-scraping: Penetrate Shadow DOM, decode hidden JSON on AI platforms.

aboutFeat2.message: Text Cleaning: Paste messy code directly, transform into usable data via Regex.

aboutFeat3.message: Rule Saving: Support writing and permanently saving your custom Regex templates.

aboutWebsite.message: 👉 Visit Pudiu website for more tools

sysPageError.message: Security Restriction: Cannot extract from browser system pages.

noDataError.message: No data found on the current page or in the memory pool.

emptyPresetError.message: Name and Regex cannot be empty.

poolOpened.message: 🔴 Cross-page pool enabled, paginated data will auto-merge.

poolClosed.message: Pool disabled, extracting current page only.

copyEmpty.message: List is empty, nothing to copy.

copyFail.message: Copy failed, please check browser permissions.

resultRegex.message: Cleaned $1 target items
